component.name: Snapmaker Orca FullSpectrum
component.summary: G-code generator for Snapmaker U1 with Full Spectrum layer blending

description.p: Snapmaker Orca FullSpectrum is an open-source FDM slicer forked from Snapmaker Orca / OrcaSlicer, optimised for the Snapmaker U1 multi-color printer. It adds support for virtual mixed-color filaments — new colors created by alternating layers between physical filaments.

ul.li: Mix two physical filaments into a new apparent color via layer alternation
Customisable ratios, gradients, and repeating layer patterns
Per-pair Bias control to shift apparent color without changing cadence
Advanced dithering controls for segment height fine-tuning
Brute-force color mixer to suggest 2-, 3-, or 4-filament combinations
